creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
This is specific to ARM and not amd64 ? Can you import the pool on a non arm system ?  I remember a while ago, I had problems with the older mfi controllers and boot blocks. When you wrote the new boot code, where did you get the pmbr and gptzfsboot files from ?
Are the disks on the mfi controller jbod or single raid0 devices  ?
